creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
(In reply to p5B2EA84B3 from comment #5)

You could have reacted 2 months ago based on the fact that I did provide you with a probable patch to your issue within the hour of your issue being opened?  Just maybe someone could have been pinged to ask for inclusion in a new pkg release, but that time is lost now either way.

OPNsense hit the same issue back in July. https://github.com/opnsense/update/issues/93


Cheers,
Franco
